summary: HomePage.tsx was modified and already uses TanStack Router’s useNavigate, but the provided diff snippet is truncated before showing the requested 3-option (List/Rent/Invest) interface. A separate file summary claims the 3-option interface exists, but this cannot be directly verified from the visible HomePage.tsx content. The changes also appear to include broader Home page redesign/extra sections beyond the specific BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Broader HOME page redesign and additional marketing sections beyond the requested 3-option (List/Rent/Invest) navigation interface (e.g., hero redesign, stats bar, how-it-works steps, featured properties grid, why-us, full-width CTA).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asks for adding a prominent 3-option interface on the existing HOME page and wiring those options to existing routes; it does not request a full home-page redesign or new sections.
